arts.ttl: Leeds on verge of promotion after Piroe’s four-goal salvo in Stoke rout
arts.sum: Leeds United’s long march is almost over. Aided by a vastly superior goal difference, Daniel Farke’s side may yet require a maximum of one more point to rubber-stamp promotion but, depending on the outcome in the evening kick-off at Turf Moor, could be back in the Premier League as soon as Easter Monday night. Not even heavy rain and a marked dip in the Easter temperature could dampen the euphoria inside Elland Road as Joel Piroe registered a hat-trick in the first 20 minutes. By half-time Farke’s key striker had scored four times. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Heading to Premier League in style? Leeds 6-0 Stoke!
arts.sum: Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship match between Leeds and Stoke.

arts.ttl: Stoke City player ratings vs Leeds Utd in Elland Road humiliation
arts.sum: The second goal came when Wilson-Esbrand dawdled on the ball before a pass to Bae Junho, who was immediately robbed by Jayden Bogle and leave Stoke’s centre-backs running to the wrong fire as the ball was played back behind them for another Piroe tap-in. The opening goal came when Tchamadeu passed aimlessly inside – but Stoke actually won it back only for Million Manhoef to lose it again, then Tchamadeu to nudge it inside again on the stretch, straight to Piroe, who worked with Manor Solomon via a loose Ashley Phillips touch to get a tap-in past Viktor Johansson.

arts.ttl: Four-goal Joel Piroe puts Leeds on the brink of promotion to the Premier League
arts.sum: Leeds will be promoted on Monday night if results go their way.

arts.ttl: 'They can reach out and touch promotion!' | Piroe HAT-TRICK gets Leeds off to dream start!
arts.sum: Leeds' Joel Piroe gets his team off to the perfect start with a first-half hat-trick against Stoke.

arts.ttl: How to watch Burnley vs Sheffield United on TV for free as promotion on the line for Leeds United
arts.sum: Leeds United supporters will be closely watching Burnley's EFL Championship match against Sheffield United on Easter Monday - as they could secure promotion by the end of the day. The good news for supporters is that the Burnley game will be available to watch for free on TV.

arts.ttl: Stoke City team news vs Leeds United as Mark Robins makes two changes
arts.sum: Stoke: Johansson, Tchamadeu, Wilson-Esbrand, Phillips, Wilmot, Pearson, Burger, Baker, Manhoef, Junho, Al-Hamadi. It means Viktor Johansson starts in goal behind a back four of Junior Tchamadeu, Wilson-Esbrand, Ash Phillips and Ben Wilmot.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Stoke City on TV? Channel, live stream details and how to watch
arts.sum: Daniel Farke could secure Leeds United promotion to the Premier League on Easter Monday. Who are the Leeds United vs Stoke City officials?

arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Stoke City as Daniel Farke makes Harry Gray decision
arts.sum: Daniel James did not look at ease after coming on against Oxford United on Good Friday amid his return from a hamstring injury and so he is replaced by Harry Gray in the matchday squad. Joe Rothwell's injury and Ampadu's presence in defence amid Pascal Struijk's absence means Ao Tanaka and Ilia Gruev start a fourth straight match.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Stoke in Championship and more from EFL: football – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 3pm BST games in the Football League Cardiff sack Riza and hand reins to Ramsey Get in touch – email Barry with your thoughts Cardiff City: The Welsh side are second from bottom of the Championship table and host Oxford United thisd afternoon. Following Saturday’s dismissal of Omer Riza, Aaron Ramsey has been given the job of keeping Cardiff up with just three games of the season remaining. The 34-year-old midfielder has not played for Cardiff since suffering the latest in a long litany of hamstring injuries in March. Continue reading...
